title: Mulukhiyah Tacos
description: An earthy and crispy Mexican dish featuring mulukhiyah in a twist on traditional tacos, egg-free-friendly for an energizing snack.

ingredients.name: Tortilla chips
ingredients.notes: For serving as a base for the taco

instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add mulukhiyah and sauté until slightly softened, about 5 minutes.
Deglaze with tomato sauce, stirring occasionally. Cook until the mixture thickens, approximately 3-4 minutes more.
Season with cumin powder and salt to taste.
Warm tortilla chips in a separate pan or microwave for 10 seconds each.
Assemble tacos by placing a dollop of mulukhiyah sauce on each warm tortilla chip. Serve immediately.
